decisions.notes: Direction and body axis are corrected, but Walking shows conspicuous paw/leg stretching plus small detached fragments near the feet. Rejected at the animation gate and blocked from UE Apartment.

caveats: Approval covers the isolated Dog-rig Walking/Idle review; Unreal trajectory, collision, audio, and apartment occlusion remain separate downstream gates.
decisions.notes: Walking side/front and Idle side media show forward-consistent orientation, straight torso/head alignment, usable quadruped deformation, grounded paws, stable body motion, and no visible detached geometry.
